notes: Originally frozen after Stage 8 final gate; server_version was later corrected in Stage 12 Step 5B after runtime-visible/auth-startup history was recalculated.
This is a committed frozen baseline, not a runtime-generated value. Tests compare the current computed surface against this file; the file is the source of truth.
Only server_version changed in Stage 12 Step 5B; connectorShapeVersion, outputMode, tool_count and tool-surface fingerprints remained unchanged.
ChatGPT connector UI version 1.0.0 is connector/app metadata, not MCP initialize.result.serverInfo.version.
Update this manifest only in a future explicit connector-surface/baseline-change stage, never automatically from computed output.

Updated after approved pre-OAuth hardening: code_sample_js removed from auth.none public surface; public tool count is now 13 and tool-surface fingerprints intentionally changed. Connector refresh is required before treating live connector surface as updated.
